archetype: Archetype 3 (Pastel & Soft) mixed with Neo-Brutalism (E1 twist)

spacing_and_layout.general: Generous padding (p-6, p-8) and thick margins to isolate elements.
spacing_and_layout.grid: Bento Grid Mode B (Control Room) but with neo-brutalist distinct cards.
spacing_and_layout.radius: rounded-xl (mix hard edges with soft pastels)
spacing_and_layout.shadows: Hard drop shadows: shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#1A1A1A] or shadow-[6px_6px_0px_#1A1A1A]

components.cards: bg-white or pastel accent color, border-2 border-[#1A1A1A], shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#1A1A1A], hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[6px_6px_0px_#1A1A1A] transition-all rounded-xl
components.buttons: bg-[#A8E6CF] text-[#1A1A1A] font-black uppercase tracking-wider border-2 border-[#1A1A1A] shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#1A1A1A] active:translate-y-1 active:shadow-none transition-all px-6 py-3 rounded-xl
components.inputs: bg-white border-2 border-[#1A1A1A] focus:ring-0 focus:outline-none focus:bg-[#FDFBF7] p-3 shadow-[2px_2px_0px_#1A1A1A] rounded-xl text-[#1A1A1A]
components.navigation: Sticky top nav with solid background (bg-[#FDFBF7] with hard bottom border-2 border-[#1A1A1A]), z-50
components.charts: Recharts inside neo-brutalist cards, use thick strokes (strokeWidth={3}), fill with pastel colors and thick borders.

icons.style: weight='bold' or weight='duotone' to match the thick neo-brutalist aesthetic.

media.description: Close-up pink piggy bank on vibrant pink background for login/welcome screen
Gold and silver round euro coins, useful for background or empty states

accessibility.contrast: Extremely high contrast ensured by thick #1A1A1A borders and text against light pastel backgrounds.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install the required libraries: yarn add @phosphor-icons/react recharts
Use Shadcn UI components but heavily customize them: remove default muted shadows and add border-2 border-[#1A1A1A] with shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#1A1A1A] instead.
For the main 'Huchas' (Piggy Banks) list, use an asymmetric bento grid. Render each hucha card with a different background color from the pastel accents (mint, lavender, peach, coral, yellow).
Ensure 'data-testid' is present on all forms, inputs, buttons, and hucha cards.
For the real-time balance, use large striking typography (Outfit text-5xl+ tracking-tighter).
Do NOT use glassmorphism or soft blurry shadows. This is a tactile Neo-brutalist design. Every surface is solid and defined by a hard black border.
The currency is restricted exclusively to Euros (€).
Implement the Transaction History and Statistics views using the specified Neo-Brutalist cards.
Add the font import to App.css or index.css and extend the tailwind theme font families.
